title: paramiflos glandulosus
intro: Paramiflos glandulosus, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible seeds. The medicinal properties of Paramiflos glandulosus include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Paramiflos glandulosus can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although its seeds and flowers are often used in traditional medicine to make a soothing and calming remedy.
